name: Okta Privileged Accounts on Personal Email Domains
description: Detects privileged okta accounts tied to personal email domains.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.email AS email FROM okta_users u WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(u.status, '')) IN ('active','enabled','provisioned','onboarded') AND (COALESCE(u.is_admin, false) = true) AND LOWER(COALESCE(u.email, '')) RLIKE '.*@(gmail|yahoo|hotmail|outlook)\\.com$'
remediation: Migrate privileged accounts to corporate identity domains and remove personal-domain privileged access.
